properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God sent me a friend Who was bold and not afraid He had a simple friendship But a prophet's material he was made

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He was my friend my friend my friend (2X) He was my friend He was my friend (2X) He was my friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He brought me a simple Message and he told me, Only believe The bride of Jesus Christ She will never be decieved By Churches, people or men who have problems with my friend

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: With my friend, my friend, my friend (2X) With my friend, he was my friend (2X) With my friend

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There in the spoken Word is a promise By my friend And one of these days, he will ride this trail again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'll see my friend, my friend my friend (2X) I'll see my friend, I'll see my friend, (2X) I'll see my friend
